rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW PASQUINI VS. EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Re-Filed Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 14, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTs MIU LEE, VALERIE LEE, DARREN LEE, EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC.'s Re-Filed Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer To First Amended Complaint Continued to June 30, 2017. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the motion, opposition and reply, if any, to department 501 no later than June 14, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
